s1.title: PRODUCTION COMPLEX
s1.subtitle: The modern production structure of Gurlan Global Teks integrates all stages of the textile cycle — from cotton processing to finished product manufacturing. Process integration, the use of advanced technologies, and quality control at every stage ensure stability, efficiency, and compliance with international standards.

cards.title: Spinning Department
description: Yarn production using equipment from Trützschler, Rieter, Zinser, and Saurer.

cards.title: Knitting Department
cards.description: Production of knitted fabrics using machinery from Mayer, Orizio, Pilotelli, and Vilike.

cards.title: Dyeing Department
cards.description: Fabric dyeing using technologies from Corino, Ferraro, and Odesi.

cards.title: Sewing Department
cards.description: Manufacturing of finished garments using equipment from Juki, Kansai, Jack, and Herbert Pavagon.

title: PRODUCTION CAPACITIES
OF GURLAN GLOBAL TEKS
s2.text: The company’s total production capacities ensure a full-cycle textile manufacturing process — from yarn to finished products. Each year, the enterprise produces thousands of tons of goods, including yarn, fabrics, and finished garments that comply with international quality standards.

s3.title: Annually, the company produces
s3.subtitle: Modern technologies and large-scale production enable stable supplies to international markets.

stats.label: HARD ALLOYS: pipes, rods, and profiles for engineering, aviation, shipbuilding, and other transport sectors
SOFT ALLOYS: standard profiles manufactured according to customer drawings for construction, bridge engineering, load-bearing systems, and transport sectors
Manufactured for cities in the Russian Federation and foreign customers

s4.title: CERTIFICATION AND QUALITY
paragraphs: Gurlan Global Teks places special emphasis on product quality, sustainable development, and compliance with international standards. The integration of modern technologies, quality control at all stages of production, and responsible resource management enable the company to produce competitive products for the global market.

Our activities are based on the principles of transparency, environmental responsibility, and continuous process improvement. We strive to meet the expectations of our international partners and ensure consistent product quality.

certificates.title: SEDEX
certificates.subtitle: Standard for ethical and responsible business practices
